ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief description or synopsis of the compound */,
  "chemical_structure" TEXT /* Chemical structure of the compound (e.g., SMILES) */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "solubility" REAL /* Solubility of the compound in various solvents */,
  "toxicity_profile" TEXT /* Toxicity profile of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ion_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ion channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the ion channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ion channel */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Gene name associated with the ion channel */,
  "protein_sequence" TEXT /* Protein sequence of the ion channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound used in the experiment */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ion channel tested in the experiment */,
  "ic50_value" REAL /* IC50 value of the compound for the ion channel */,
  "hill_coefficient" REAL /* Hill coefficient of the compound for the ion channel */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experimental_method" TEXT /* Experimental method used (e.g., patch-clamp, fluorescence) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality assessment (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES ion_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., cardiology, neuroscience) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Whether data was downloaded or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound */,
  "synonym_name" TEXT /* Alternative name for the compound */,
  "synonym_type" TEXT /* Type of synonym (e.g., trade name, chemical name) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_synonyms_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ion channel */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease or physiological effect associated with the ion channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the association */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., causal, correlated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_associations_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES ion_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment supported by the grant */,
  "grant_name" TEXT /* Name of the grant */,
  "grant_agency" TEXT /* Agency providing the grant */,
  "grant_amount" REAL /* Amount of the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_grants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
